case_title: CCSF/TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE VS. GREGORY GETTYS

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-20-2023 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO FEB-21-2024 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF CCSF/TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE REPRESENTED BY ANGELA COOPER IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT GREGORY GETTYS IS PRESENT. PARTIES CAME TO AN STIPULATED AGREEMENT REGARDING A PAYMENT PLAN. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE SYLVIA HUSING; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
